message.content:
@startuml

class Team {
  o name: string
  o description: string
  o ownerId: User
  o participants: Participant[]
  o topics: Topic[]
}

class Topic {
  o name: string
  o icon: string
  o isSequential: boolean
  o subtopics: Subtopic[]
}

class ChallengeReport {
  o userId: User
  o challengeId: Challenge
  o answer: string[]
  o answeredCorrectly: boolean
}

class Participant {
  o userId: User
  o points: number
  o status: ParticipantStatus
}

class Subtopic {
  o name: string
  o description: string
  o challenges: Challenge[]
}

class User {
  o name: string
  o email: string
  o educationalInstitution: string
  o educationalBackground: EducationalBackground
  o birthDate: Date
  o points: number
}

class Challenge {
  o name: string
  o body: string
  o type: ChallengeType
  o selection: string[]
  o correct: string[]
  o points: number
  o feedback: string
}

enum ParticipantStatus {
  PENDING
  ACCEPTED
  DISABLED
}

enum EducationalBackground {
  MIDDLE_INCOMPLETE
  MIDDLE_ONGOING
  MIDDLE_COMPLETE
  HIGH_INCOMPLETE
  HIGH_ONGOING
  HIGH_COMPLETE
  GRADUATION_INCOMPLETE
  GRADUATION_ONGOING
  GRADUATION_COMPLETE
}

enum ChallengeType {
  INPUT
  RADIO
  CHECKBOX
}

Team "1" o-- "0..n" Topic
Team "1" o-- "0..n" Participant
Team "1" o-- "1" User

Topic "1" o-- "0..n" Subtopic

Subtopic "1" o-- "0..n" Challenge

ChallengeReport "1" --> "1" User : userId
ChallengeReport "1" --> "1" User : challengeId

Participant "1" --> "1" User : userId
Participant --> ParticipantStatus : o status

User --> EducationalBackground : o educationalBackground

Challenge --> ChallengeType : o type

@enduml
